Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Juliette B. McCullough, Esq. of Keesal Young & Logan, Tel. 415.398.6000, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Counsel provided the Court with a copy of the proof of service at the hearing. For good cause and to the satisfaction of the Court, PETITIONER WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
